title: 菊花賞の後に・サイコーのレース！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the competition between BNW is tight,
Winning Ticket takes first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to race against her rivals again soon, so
with that in mind, we choose the likeliest place
they'll be—the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide are
distant in their attitude toward Winning Ticket.
